-  isProcessRestoreEnabled 

Instance Property# isProcessRestoreEnabled

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+

```
var isProcessRestoreEnabled: Bool { get set }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/catapdescription/isprocessrestoreenabled#discussion)

True if this tap should save tapped processes by bundle ID when they exit, and restore them to the tap when they start up again.
